artifact: Use raceId 19, second qualifying period q2, and the minimum q2 lap time.
sql: SELECT d.surname FROM qualifying q JOIN drivers d ON d.driverId = q.driverId WHERE q.raceId = 19 AND q.q2 IS NOT NULL AND q.q2 <> '' ORDER BY q.q2 ASC LIMIT 1;

raw_response.sql: SELECT d.surname FROM qualifying q JOIN drivers d ON d.driverId = q.driverId WHERE q.raceId = 19 AND q.q2 IS NOT NULL AND q.q2 <> '' ORDER BY q.q2 ASC LIMIT 1;
